title: Tesla (the company / car)
html:
Tesla

Stub. Aspirational reference object in Yahir's late-2021 notes — "Buy a Tesla" opens 2021 10 24 buy a tesla as the first item on his you've-made-it list. Distinct from Tesla the man referenced in 2021 10 19 setting your heart ablaze's Tesla-vs-Edison frame.
